sql: WITH fl AS (SELECT address FROM follow_list), sm AS ( SELECT ws.address FROM wallet_scores ws WHERE ws.total_realized_sol_drop_top3 > 0 AND ws.monthly_run_rate_sol >= 3.75 AND ws.total_realized_sol >= 0.5 AND COALESCE(ws.avg_hold_sec,0) >= 300 AND COALESCE(ws.win_rate,1) <= 0.95 AND COALESCE(json_extract(ws.venues_json,'$.pumpswap'),0)*1.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(value) FROM json_each(ws.venues_json)),0) >= 0.5 ), u AS (SELECT address FROM fl UNION SELECT address FROM sm) SELECT 'follow_list' t, COUNT(*) n FROM fl UNION ALL SELECT 'smart_set', COUNT(*) FROM sm UNION ALL SELECT 'union_fl_smart', COUNT(*) FROM u
